overall.description: Cinematic footage from a fantasy video game showing students in wizard robes socializing in a castle courtyard decorated with house banners. The scene transitions from a ground-level view of the courtyard to a dramatic reveal of a large house tapestry with the castle spires visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with festival banners and towers

agents.ego_description: standing still in the courtyard observing the surrounding students and castle architecture

notable_agents.action: student holding a broomstick, shifting weight and looking around the courtyard
group of three students in green robes conversing and gesturing

entered.detail: tall stone castle walls with crenellations and cylindrical towers featuring red and gold accents
vertical striped banners in red and gold hanging from the castle walls
strings of small pennant flags stretched between towers overhead
well-maintained green grass covering the ground of the courtyard
tall stone tower with pointed roof and wooden accents

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a castle courtyard where students in wizard robes gather on the grass. Red and gold house banners hang from the stone walls behind them, and decorative pennant strings stretch overhead between towers. The students stand in small groups conversing, with one student in the center holding a broomstick.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle grounds with large house tapestry display

events.description: dissolve transition from courtyard scene to view of large vertical house tapestry with castle spires in background

agents.ego_description: observing the large house banner and distant castle architecture from a fixed position

entered.detail: large vertical tapestry with green and silver snake emblem and diamond pattern
strings of triangular pennant flags in multiple colors stretching across the field
cluster of pointed stone spires and towers of the main castle building

segments.scene_description: Through a dissolve transition, the scene shifts to a different area of the castle grounds featuring a massive vertical tapestry displaying a silver snake emblem. The camera faces the tapestry with the castle's pointed spires visible in the distant background under a partly cloudy sky, and colorful pennant strings stretch across the empty grassy field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous visual progression from a lively gathering of students in a castle courtyard to a dramatic reveal of a massive house emblem. It begins with a steady view of students in wizard robes conversing on the grass, surrounded by red and gold house banners and decorative pennant strings stretching between stone towers. As the perspective shifts, the bustling social scene dissolves into a wider, quieter expanse of the castle grounds. The view then opens up to face a towering vertical tapestry featuring a silver snake emblem, while the distant pointed spires of the castle emerge against a partly cloudy sky. Finally, the camera settles on this imposing display as colorful pennants stretch across the empty grassy field.
